name: Pan Rolls ABM
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Vegetable oil or melted butter
recipeInstructions:
Pan Rolls (this recipe is great for the BM using the dough setting)
1. In a large bowl, dissolve yeast in lukewarm water.
2. Blend in eggs and oil or melted butter.
3. Add 5 cups bread mix. Blend well.
4. Add additional bread mix to make a soft, but not too sticky dough. Knead about 5 minutes until dough is smooth.
5. Lightly butter bowl. Put dough in bowl and turn to butter top. Cover dough with a damp towel and let rise in a warm place until doubled in bulk, about 1 hour.
6. Grease a 13" x 9" baking pan or two 9" round pans.
7. Punch down dough again until doubled in bulk, about 30 to 40 minutes.
8. Preheat oven to 375°F.
9. Bake 20 to 25 minutes, until golden brown. Makes about 24 rolls.
